title: Stussy Betrays CP0
description: On pages 14–16, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Vegapunk, Unknown person #14, Jinbe, Unknown person #15, Luffy as CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.
scene: CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I'm still not ready for this....

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm not able to take it in yet....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: But...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I don't know what happened, I won't be able to understand anything....!! Isn't that right, father?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, at least it's going down in a really flashy way, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Although this is where the Seraphim was first born...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Clink!

dialogue.speaker: Vegapunk
dialogue.text: Now, where might you be, Stella?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Clark!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Kuwahahaha! Take a look at this!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: An amazing scoop just came in!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Cool

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Click!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The world government is carrying out an assassination on none other than Dr. Vegapunk!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're really going to kill the world's greatest genius?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This seems to be a repeat of the ohara incident!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...However, the govern-ment is making a mistake! Vegapunk is a popular figure worldwide!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's lit up many towns around the world with his developments in energy!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Luckily, someone that happens to be there is...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: This guy!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Alright, then our headline will be as it follows! ONE OF THE FOUR EMPERORS,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Straw hat" Luffy, has taken vegapunk hostage and waged war against the marines!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The government is gonna love me! I want a reward for this!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Under- stood!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: What a silly news article!

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: Luffy would never do such a thing!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I LEND HER THAT SHIRT...OM NEVER GONNA WASH IT. ♤

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Hey!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Watch your voice! There's a spy transponder snail around here! If our location gets revealed...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: The govern- Ment will erase us!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Also, more-chan is hidding us! Don't be rude!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The girl who was crying up 'til yesterday!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't act so stuck up and talk back to me about my job!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The one that will rifle up the world will be me!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's not about truth or lies! The newspaper is all about entertainment!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: infor- mation runs through the world!!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Under Siege through 36 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
